ogTitle: Curlew Waters vs Curlwaa: Climate Safety

heading: Curlew Waters vs Curlwaa — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Curlew Waters, New South Wales and Curlwaa, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Curlew Waters has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Curlwaa (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Curlew Waters or Curlwaa safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Curlew Waters has a flood risk score of 39/100, while Curlwaa scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Curlew Waters scores 25/100 for bushfire risk. Curlwaa scores 53/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Curlew Waters or Curlwaa?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Curlew Waters has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.83% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
